summary: Plan-only assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are permitted by mode or job blockers. Four narrow PRs have passing checks and no hydrated review comments, but none has the required Codex /review merge preflight proof, so they are kept as related repair/maintainer-review candidates rather than merge candidates. The large UI feature PR has a failing CI check and multiple unresolved review-bot findings, so it needs human/author follow-up before any merge path.
